message:
test(rchd): Add unit tests for alerts and telemetry modules

**rchd/src/alerts.rs (+408 lines):**
- AlertConfig tests: default values, custom configuration
- AlertSeverity tests: rank ordering (Critical < Error < Warning < Info)
- AlertKind tests: as_str() conversion for all variants
- Alert tests: new() constructor, to_info() conversion, ID uniqueness
- AlertManager tests: alert triggering, duplicate suppression, history
- Full coverage of alert lifecycle and severity handling

**rchd/src/telemetry.rs (+402 lines):**
- TelemetryPollerConfig tests: default values, custom config, clone, debug
- TelemetryStore tests: nonexistent worker handling, empty store behavior
- Speed score tests: no storage path handling, history queries
- Latest telemetry tests: single worker, multiple workers, all workers
- Store capacity tests: retention duration, max records per worker
- Edge case coverage for missing data and empty results

These tests ensure the alerting and telemetry infrastructure behaves
correctly under various conditions, improving reliability of daemon
health monitoring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
